nasb.text: I have issued a decree that any of the people of Israel and their priests and the Levites in my kingdom who are willing to go to Jerusalem, may go with you.

esv.text: I make a decree that anyone of the people of Israel or their priests or Levites in my kingdom, who freely offers to go to Jerusalem, may go with you.

cnv.text: 現在我下令：住在我國中的以色列人中，願意上到耶路撒冷去的祭司和利未人，他們都可以與你同去。

ccb.text: “我现在降旨，我国中的以色列人、祭司和利未人，凡愿意上耶路撒冷的都可以与你同去。
